summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and paired delegate together as an end-to-end readonly smoke path. The wrapper is conservative and aligns with the best-effort/evidence-backed contract, but the pair has a material compatibility risk: the wrapper assumes delegate support for structured sidecar/stdout JSON with specific fields, while the delegate only conditionally guarantees those fields and can emit failure shapes that are too sparse for robust wrapper interpretation. Overall verdict: needs_revision.
notes: Used supplied artifact snapshots as grounded evidence.
Evaluated wrapper and delegate together per review scope.
